paper_title: ASSESSMENT OF AGRI-PRODUCT VALUE CHAINS IN THE MEKONG DELTA: PROBLEMS AND SOLUTIONS

entities.description: The author of the paper assessing agri-product value chains.
An institute belonging to Can Tho University where the author is affiliated.
A major university in Vietnam, the affiliation of the author.
The main research field of the paper focusing on agri-product value chains.
The central research problem concerning the production and distribution of agricultural goods.
The goal of upgrading value chains toward stable and long-term growth.
A methodology used to analyze the dynamics and distribution within value chains.
A systematic manual for value chain development.
The 'Making Value Chains Work Better for the Poor' approach.
Data collection tools used with chain actors and stakeholders.
Detailed analysis of selected supply chains involving companies and farmer groups.
Vietnamese Good Agricultural Practices standards.
International standards for Good Agricultural Practices.
Numerical survey data collected from 1,759 stakeholders in the Mekong Delta.
